\tzpentry{ID3736}{Text Magnetic Flux Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3736 introduces Text Magnetic Flux Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\n\\epsilon_{\\text{TZP}} = \\frac{1}{\\Phi^2}, \\quad \\text{where} \\quad \\Phi := \\frac{1 + \\sqrt{5}}{2}\n\\]
